seoTitle: San José Unified School District Calendar 2026-27 | SJUSD PDF
seoDescription: View the SJUSD 2026-2027 calendar verified against the official district PDF, with Aug 6 first day, May 27 last day, holidays, breaks and ICS download.
calendarNotes: This page summarizes major student dates from the official SJUSD Student Calendar. It may not include every community calendar item, school-specific event, or optional extended school year detail.

calendarFaqs.q: When does San José Unified start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: San José Unified students start the 2026-2027 regular school year on Thursday, August 6, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SJUSD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring recess on the SJUSD 2026-2027 Student Calendar runs Monday, April 5 through Friday, April 9, 2027. Students return Monday, April 12, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SJUSD Thanksgiving Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving recess on the SJUSD 2026-2027 Student Calendar runs Wednesday, November 25 through Friday, November 27, 2026. Students return Monday, November 30, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Does SJUSD have school on Veterans Day in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: No. The SJUSD 2026-2027 Student Calendar marks Wednesday, November 11, 2026 as a student holiday for Veterans Day.

calendarFaqs.q: How many student days are in the SJUSD 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: MySchoolDates calculates 180 student days from the published SJUSD Student Calendar by excluding listed recesses and student holidays between August 6, 2026 and May 27, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does SJUSD have school on holidays in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: No school is scheduled on the student holidays and recess periods shown in the SJUSD Student Calendar, including Labor Day, Veterans Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Fall Recess, Thanksgiving Recess, New Year Recess, Winter Recess, and Spring Recess. Families should still verify last-minute updates on the official SJUSD events page.

yearNumbers.label: Student Days
yearNumbers.detail: MySchoolDates calculation from the published SJUSD Student Calendar, excluding listed recesses and student holidays between August 6, 2026 and May 27, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Shortened-Day Windows
yearNumbers.detail: The official student calendar lists elementary, secondary, and all-school shortened-day windows during October, December, March, and May.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 7 in 2025-2026 to August 6 in 2026-2027.
The last day moves from May 29 in 2025-2026 to May 27 in 2026-2027.
Fall recess moves from September 29-October 3 in 2025-2026 to September 28-October 2 in 2026-2027.
Spring recess moves from April 6-10 in 2025-2026 to April 5-9 in 2026-2027.

customSections.label: Planning Around SJUSD Breaks
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 SJUSD Student Calendar includes three week-long recesses and a two-week New Year recess window. Confirm shortened-day details with your school before arranging pickup or after-school care.

groups.label: Family planning notes
items: Fall recess runs September 28 through October 2, 2026, with students returning Monday, October 5.
New Year recess runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027, with students returning Monday, January 4.
Winter recess runs February 15-19, 2027, and Spring recess runs April 5-9, 2027.
The last day, May 27, 2027, is also listed as an all-schools early-release day.
